channel.title: GitHub PureScript Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of PureScript in GitHub

item.title: purescript/purescript-strings
item.description: String utility functions, Char type, regular expressions.

item.title: purescript/purescript-gen
item.description: A type class for random generator implementations.

item.title: purescript-contrib/purescript-nullable
item.description: A very simple library for dealing with nulls in foreign libraries

item.title: purescript/purescript-record
item.description: Functions for working with records and polymorphic labels

item.title: purescript/purescript-invariant
item.description: Invariant functors

item.title: purescript/purescript-foldable-traversable
item.description: Classes for foldable and traversable data structures

item.title: purescript/purescript-transformers
item.description: Monad and comonad transformers

item.title: purescript-contrib/purescript-avar
item.description: Low-level interface for asynchronous variables

item.title: purescript/purescript-free
item.description: Free monads, Cofree comonads, Yoneda and Coyoneda functors, and the Trampoline monad.

item.title: purescript/purescript-enums
item.description: Operations for sequentially ordered types

item.title: purescript/purescript-datetime
item.description: Date and time library for PureScript.

item.title: purescript/purescript-st
item.description: The ST effect, for safe local mutation

item.title: purescript/purescript-math
item.description: Math functions

item.title: purescript/purescript-integers
item.description: Functions and bitwise operators for the Int numeric type

item.title: purescript/purescript-parallel
item.description: Classes for parallel composition and racing of asynchronous computations

item.title: purescript/purescript-catenable-lists
item.description: Catenable lists

item.title: purescript-contrib/purescript-now
item.description: Effect type and functions for accessing the current machine's date and time.

item.title: purescript/purescript-exceptions
item.description: Exception effects

item.title: purescript/purescript-functions
item.description: Function combinators and types for multi-argument functions

item.title: purescript/purescript-prelude
item.description: The PureScript Prelude

item.title: purescript/purescript-psci-support
item.description: Support module for the PSCI interactive mode

item.title: purescript/purescript-identity
item.description: Identity value

item.title: purescript/purescript-newtype
item.description: Type class and functions for working with newtypes

item.title: purescript/purescript-maybe
item.description: Optional values

item.title: purescript/purescript-tailrec
item.description: A type class which captures stack-safe monadic tail recursion
